title: View real-time stats and data freshness on dashboard load
description: Verifies that opening the dashboard automatically renders global stats including data freshness indicators and top collected keywords.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Verify global real-time statistics are displayed
Verify data freshness indicators including an active dataset/sync version and top collected keywords are displayed

title: View the 3D trend chart on dashboard load
description: Verifies that the 3D trend visualization renders on page initialization so users can start exploring domain trajectories.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Verify a 3D trend visualization is displayed

title: Open a domain time-series detail by selecting a chart point
description: Verifies that selecting a point in the 3D trend visualization reveals time-series details for the chosen domain.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Click a visible point on the 3D trend chart
Verify time-series details for a selected domain are displayed

title: Run N-depth analysis from a category keyword and review results
description: Verifies that submitting a category keyword returns an N-depth category view with products, related keywords, and a focused trend chart.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Fill "wireless earbuds" into the category/keyword search field
Submit the category analysis search
Verify an N-depth category path or tree is displayed
Verify a product list and a focused trend chart are displayed for the analysis results

title: Start analysis from a popular keyword chip
description: Selecting a popular keyword chip filters the analysis view so the product list and trend chart update to reflect that keyword.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for popular keyword chips to load
Click a popular keyword chip
Verify a product list is displayed for the selected keyword
Verify a focused trend chart is displayed for the selected keyword

title: See collection progress indicators during rolling updates
description: Verifies that the dashboard presents collection progress and recent-activity signals so users can understand ongoing updates and what domains are active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Verify collection progress information is displayed
Verify a view of recent activity by domain or keyword is displayed

title: Rotate or pan the 3D trend view to inspect different slices
description: Verifies that users can manipulate the 3D trend visualization to inspect different domains and time slices.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Click and drag on the 3D trend chart to rotate the view
Click and drag on the 3D trend chart again to pan the view
Verify the 3D trend visualization view updates in response to the interaction

title: Iterate on N-depth analysis by refining the keyword fragment
description: Verifies that users can refine a keyword and re-run analysis to update the returned products/keywords and trend chart.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Fill "protein" into the category/keyword search field
Submit the category analysis search
Fill "protein bar" into the category/keyword search field
Submit the category analysis search
Verify the analysis results refresh to show a new or updated product list and focused trend chart

title: Browse popular keywords and switch between chips
description: Switching from one popular keyword chip to another updates the displayed analysis results accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for popular keyword chips to load
Click one popular keyword chip
Click a different popular keyword chip
Verify the analysis results update after switching chips
Verify the product list is still displayed after switching chips

title: Identify which keywords are currently most collected
description: Verifies that users can see a ranked or grouped view of top-collected keywords to decide what to explore next.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Scroll to the top-collected keywords section
Verify a list of top-collected keywords is displayed

title: Generate a short-form plan from a keyword input
description: Submitting a keyword on the RAPTOR page generates a plan output including top product picks and hook points.

steps.description: Navigate to /raptor.html
Fill a valid keyword into the RAPTOR input field
Request generation of a short-form plan
Verify a generated plan output is displayed
Verify top recommended products and hook points are displayed

title: Regenerate a plan after refining the input
description: Refining the RAPTOR input and requesting regeneration updates the displayed plan output.

steps.description: Navigate to /raptor.html
Fill a valid keyword into the RAPTOR input field
Request generation of a short-form plan
Fill additional refinement text into the RAPTOR input field
Request regeneration of the short-form plan
Verify an updated plan output is displayed after regeneration
Verify top recommended products and hook points are displayed after regeneration

title: Chip selection is reflected consistently in analysis area
description: After selecting a popular keyword chip, the analysis area consistently reflects the selected keyword without showing mismatched or stale results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for popular keyword chips to load
Click a popular keyword chip
Scroll to the analysis results section
Verify the analysis view appears consistent, with products and trend visualization aligned to the current selection

title: Explore returned category path and drill into listed products or keywords
description: Verifies that after running analysis, users can interact with the returned category path/tree and related items to continue exploration without breaking the view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Fill "standing desk" into the category/keyword search field
Submit the category analysis search
Click a category node or segment within the returned N-depth category path/tree
Verify the focused trend chart and product list update to reflect the selected node

title: Navigate between dashboard and RAPTOR without losing input expectations
description: Moving from RAPTOR to the dashboard and back keeps the pages usable and the RAPTOR page still clearly accepts new input for generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /raptor.html
Fill a valid keyword into the RAPTOR input field
Click the link to go to the main dashboard
Click the link to return to the RAPTOR page
Verify the RAPTOR input field is available for entering a keyword
Verify the user can see the controls needed to request plan generation

title: Chip interaction remains responsive after multiple selections
description: Repeatedly selecting different popular keyword chips keeps the UI responsive and continues updating analysis results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for popular keyword chips to load
Click a popular keyword chip
Click a different popular keyword chip
Click a third popular keyword chip
Verify the analysis results are displayed after the final selection
Verify the page remains interactive after multiple selections

title: Show validation prompt when submitting N-depth search with empty input
description: Verifies that submitting the category analysis with an empty keyword prompts the user to enter a keyword and does not run analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Focus the category/keyword search field
Press Enter
Verify a keyword-required validation prompt is visible

title: Prevent generation with empty input
description: Attempting to generate a RAPTOR plan with empty input shows a validation prompt and does not produce a plan output.

steps.description: Navigate to /raptor.html
Fill whitespace-only text into the RAPTOR input field
Request generation of a short-form plan
Verify an input validation message is visible
Verify no plan output is displayed

title: Popular keywords show an empty state when no chips are available
description: If popular keywords cannot be displayed as chips, the page shows an appropriate empty state instead of a broken UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the popular keywords area to finish loading
Verify either popular keyword chips are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Handle long and special-character keywords in RAPTOR input
description: Submitting a long keyword with special characters still results in a generated plan output without UI breakage.

steps.description: Navigate to /raptor.html
Fill a very long keyword string with special characters into the RAPTOR input field
Request generation of a short-form plan
Verify a generated plan output is displayed
Verify the plan area renders normally without broken layout
